[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 1101110100 6
7 1110000111 6

01 10 1100000100 3
12 21 0100000100 2
23 32 0000001000 1
34 43 0000010000 1
45 54 0000010000 1
56 65 0001010000 2
67 76 1001000000 2
70 07 1101000100 4

02 20 0101000100 3
13 31 0010000010 2
24 42 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
35 53 0000011010 3
46 64 0000010000 1
57 75 0101001001 4
60 06 1001010000 3
71 17 1100000101 4

03 30 0000110000 2
14 41 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5

47 74 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5

61 16 1010000000 2
72 27 0101001100 4

26 62 0001000000 1
37 73 0000001000 1
